query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'ai_engine_logs' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'trigger_signals' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3REGGwCEMbpiL33.root --database mLLZEfmfSEuH47dfeJgVGY --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'ai_engine_logs' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'trigger_signals' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION LIMIT 15;
